quick_start.intro: 先确认系统在线，再看本机模型和引擎，最后再提问或输入命令。

steps.title: 确认系统在线
steps.body: 先看顶部状态和 Agent 状态是否正常。

steps.title: 确认本机资源
steps.body: 检查 models、engines、deployments 三块是否有内容。

steps.title: 开始提问或输入命令
steps.body: 可以直接提问，也可以先用常用命令快速查看状态。

commands.label: 查看系统状态
commands.description: 检查硬件、部署和资源概况。

commands.label: 查看帮助
commands.description: 查看命令帮助和可用用法。

commands.label: 查看硬件
commands.description: 查看 GPU、CPU、内存等基础信息。

commands.label: 查看模型
commands.description: 确认 AIMA 已识别到哪些模型。

commands.label: 查看引擎
commands.description: 确认本机可用推理引擎。

commands.label: 查看部署
commands.description: 检查当前运行中的部署。

groups.title: 顶层命令
groups.description: 由服务端动态填充的顶层命令列表。

items.description: 先看当前硬件推荐使用哪个引擎。
预先拉取默认引擎，减少首次部署等待。
按模型名下载模型文件，`{sample_model}` 是示例值，可替换为实际模型名。
先预览部署解析结果和推荐配置，`{sample_model}` 是示例值，可替换为实际模型名。
一条命令拉取、部署并等待服务就绪，`{sample_model}` 是示例值，可替换为实际模型名。

items.title: Agent 不可用
items.body: 先用 status、hardware、models 等直接命令确认基础状态。

items.title: 需要配置
items.body: 点击右上角设置，检查 LLM endpoint、model 和 API key。

items.title: 需要远程协助
items.body: 点击连线灵机云，按引导进入远程协助流程。

quick_start.intro: Start by confirming the system is online, then inspect local models and engines, then ask a question or run a command.

steps.title: Check system health
steps.body: Use the top status row and Agent status to confirm the service is ready.

steps.title: Inspect local resources
steps.body: Look at models, engines, and deployments before issuing tasks.

steps.title: Ask or run a command
steps.body: You can ask AIMA directly or begin with a common command.

commands.label: System status
commands.description: Inspect hardware, deployments, and overall state.

commands.label: Help
commands.description: Show command help and available usage.

commands.label: Hardware
commands.description: Show detected GPU, CPU, and memory information.

commands.label: Models
commands.description: List models AIMA already knows about.

groups.title: Top-level commands
groups.description: Top-level commands filled dynamically by the server.

items.description: Check which engine the current hardware should use.
Pre-pull the default engine to reduce first-run latency.
Download a model by name; `{sample_model}` is an example value and can be replaced with a real model name.
Preview the resolved deployment plan before execution; `{sample_model}` is an example value and can be replaced with a real model name.
Resolve, pull, deploy, and wait for readiness in one command; `{sample_model}` is an example value and can be replaced with a real model name.

items.title: Agent unavailable
items.body: Use direct commands like status, hardware, and models first.

items.title: Need configuration help
items.body: Open Settings and verify the LLM endpoint, model, and API key.

items.title: Need remote help
items.body: Use the support button to connect to the remote assistance flow.
